description: You are a Senior E-commerce SEO Analyst retained by an online bookstore (books.toscrape.com) to audit their product catalog's SEO health. Crawl https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider to extract product prices (CSS selector: .price_color) and star ratings (CSS selector: .star-rating, class attribute). Export the custom extraction results containing the page URL, price, and rating to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ as a CSV file. Additionally, export the full internal HTML pages report to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ as a separate CSV file. Login: user=ga.
